a.label: active chart group G_act = S_3
a.standard_term: local chart-permutation group S_3 acting on the three surface roles

b.label: active chart-jet carrier / jet carrier (O_r, R_r)
b.standard_term: G-orbit of the r-jet of a function under a finite group action (jet-space group orbit, cf. Boardman/Thom-Levine orbits in singularity theory)

evidence.label: Active Role-Jet Orbit Theorem (thm:orbit)

evidence.label: active chart-jet carrier
